---
title: "Qiime2R - GBM Fungi"
output: html_notebook
---

# 1) Filter the taxonomic levels: 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(qiime2R)
metadata<-read_q2metadata("sample-metadata.tsv")
SVs<-read_qza("filtered-table-2.qza")$data
taxonomy<-read_qza("taxonomy_silva.qza")$data %>% parse_taxonomy()


# Although filter was used in qiime2, some non-fungal taxa still persisted:
###### remove Peronosporomycetes (Oomycetes, not true fungi)
taxonomy <- read_qza("taxonomy_silva.qza")$data %>%
  parse_taxonomy() %>%
  filter(!grepl("Discosea",
                paste(Phylum, Class, Order, Family), ignore.case = TRUE))

###### keep only ASVs that survived the taxonomy filter
SVs <- SVs[rownames(SVs) %in% rownames(taxonomy), ]

```



```{r}
###### taxa to exclude at each level (non-fungal organisms)
taxa_to_exclude <- list(
  Phylum  = c("Discosea"),
  Class = c("Discosea"),
  Order  = c("Discosea"),
  Family  = c("Discosea"),
  Genus  = character(0),
  Species = character(0)
)

remove_contaminants <- function(df, level) {
  excl <- taxa_to_exclude[[level]]
  if (length(excl) == 0) return(df)
  df %>% filter(!(.data[[level]] %in% excl))
}

# Filter the tables:
Phylum_table_bp  <- read.csv("Phylum_barplot_data.csv") %>% remove_contaminants("Phylum")
Class_table_bp <- read.csv("Class_barplot_data.csv") %>% remove_contaminants("Class")
Order_table_bp <- read.csv("Order_barplot_data.csv") %>% remove_contaminants("Order")
Family_table_bp <- read.csv("Family_barplot_data.csv")  %>% remove_contaminants("Family")
Genus_table_bp <- read.csv("Genus_barplot_data.csv") %>% remove_contaminants("Genus")
Species_table_bp <- read.csv("Species_barplot_data.csv") %>% remove_contaminants("Species")

```


```{r}
###### count unique taxa per level from filtered taxonomy and SVs

# only keep taxonomy rows for ASVs present in SVs
taxonomy_filtered <- taxonomy[rownames(taxonomy) %in% rownames(SVs), ]

levels <- c("Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")

cat("Unique taxa per level (after filter):\n")
for (lvl in levels) {
  if (lvl %in% colnames(taxonomy_filtered)) {
    n <- length(unique(taxonomy_filtered[[lvl]]))
    cat(" ", lvl, ":", n, "\n")
  }
}

cat("\nTotal ASVs in filtered feature table:", nrow(SVs), "\n")
```




# 2) Heatmaps:

```{r}
# HEATMAP

# Family:
taxasums<-summarize_taxa(SVs, taxonomy)$Family
taxa_heatmap(taxasums, metadata, "Grape-stage")
ggsave("Fig/heatmap_Family_2.tiff", height=4, width=8, device="tiff")

# Genus:
taxasums<-summarize_taxa(SVs, taxonomy)$Genus
taxa_heatmap(taxasums, metadata, "Grape-stage")
ggsave("Fig/heatmap_genus_2.tiff", height=4, width=9, device="tiff")


```


# 3) Bar charts:

```{r}
# Stacked barplots with data from qiime2-barplot:

library(Polychrome)
# Generate 35 distinct colors from 3 seed colors
pal <- createPalette( 35, seedcolors = c("#FF0000", "#0000FF", "#00FF00")) # red, blue, green
col_vector <- unname(pal)
# Preview the palette
swatch(col_vector)
#Remove names from the vector
col_vector <- unname(pal)  


# 1) Phylum:
head(Phylum_table_bp)
attach(Phylum_table_bp)
library(ggplot2)

# Create a new column for grape stage:
Phylum_table_bp$Group <- ifelse(grepl("Immature-[1234]", index), "Immature", 
                              ifelse(grepl("Mature-[1234]", index), "Mature", NA))
Phylum_table_bp$Phylum = with(Phylum_table_bp, reorder(Phylum, -count, mean)) # order the labels


Phylum_barplot=ggplot(Phylum_table_bp, aes(fill=Phylum, y=count, x=index)) +
  labs(x= "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)") + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_vector) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::percent_format()) + 
  facet_wrap(~Group, scales = "free_x")+ #Grouping by grape stage 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5)) 

Phylum_barplot
ggsave("Fig/Phylum_barplot2.tiff", height=4.6, width=7, device="tiff")
```


```{r}
# 2) Class:
head(Class_table_bp)
attach(Class_table_bp)
library(ggplot2)

# Create a new column for grape stage:
Class_table_bp$Group <- ifelse(grepl("Immature-[1234]", index), "Immature", 
                              ifelse(grepl("Mature-[1234]", index), "Mature", NA))
Class_table_bp$Class = with(Class_table_bp, reorder(Class, -count, mean)) # order the labels

Class_barplot=ggplot(Class_table_bp, aes(fill=Class, y=count, x=index)) +
  labs(x= "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)") + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_vector) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::percent_format()) + 
  facet_wrap(~Group, scales = "free_x")+ #Grouping by grape stage 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2))

Class_barplot

ggsave("Fig/Class_barplot2.tiff", height=4, width=6, device="tiff")
```


```{r}
# 3) Order:
head(Order_table_bp)
attach(Order_table_bp)
library(ggplot2)

# Create a new column for grape stage:
Order_table_bp$Group <- ifelse(grepl("Immature-[1234]", index), "Immature", 
                              ifelse(grepl("Mature-[1234]", index), "Mature", NA))

Order_table_bp$Order = with(Order_table_bp, reorder(Order, -count, mean)) # order the labels

Order_barplot=ggplot(Order_table_bp, aes(fill=Order, y=count, x=index)) + 
  labs(x= "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)") + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_vector) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::percent_format()) + 
  facet_wrap(~Group, scales = "free_x")+ #Grouping by grape stage 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5))

Order_barplot
ggsave("Fig/Order_barplot2.tiff", height=5, width=8, device="tiff")
```


```{r}
# 4) Family:
head(Family_table_bp)
attach(Family_table_bp)
library(ggplot2)

# Create a new column for grape stage:
Family_table_bp$Group <- ifelse(grepl("Immature-[1234]", index), "Immature", 
                              ifelse(grepl("Mature-[1234]", index), "Mature", NA))

Family_table_bp$Family = with(Family_table_bp, reorder(Family, -count, mean)) # Order the labels

Family_barplot=ggplot(Family_table_bp, aes(fill=Family, y=count, x=index)) + 
  labs(x= "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)") + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_vector) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::percent_format()) + 
  facet_wrap(~Group, scales = "free_x")+ #Grouping by grape stage 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5))

Family_barplot
ggsave("Fig/Family_barplot2.tiff", height=5, width=8.25, device="tiff")
```


```{r}
# 5) Genus:
head(Genus_table_bp)
attach(Genus_table_bp)
library(ggplot2)

# Create a new column for grape stage:
Genus_table_bp$Group <- ifelse(grepl("Immature-[1234]", index), "Immature", 
                              ifelse(grepl("Mature-[1234]", index), "Mature", NA))
Genus_table_bp$Genus = with(Genus_table_bp, reorder(Genus, -count, mean)) # Order the labels

Genus_barplot=ggplot(Genus_table_bp, aes(fill=Genus, y=count, x=index)) + 
  labs(x= "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)") + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_vector) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::percent_format()) + 
  facet_wrap(~Group, scales = "free_x")+ #Grouping by grape stage 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "italic")) 
    

Genus_barplot
ggsave("Fig/Genus_barplot2.tiff", height=5, width=8, device="tiff")
```


```{r}
# 6) Species:
head(Species_table_bp)
attach(Species_table_bp)
library(ggplot2)
# Create a new column for grape stage:
Species_table_bp$Group <- ifelse(grepl("Immature-[1234]", index), "Immature", 
                              ifelse(grepl("Mature-[1234]", index), "Mature", NA))
Species_table_bp$Species = with(Species_table_bp, reorder(Species, -count, mean)) # Order the labels

Species_barplot=ggplot(Species_table_bp, aes(fill=Species, y=count, x=index)) + 
  labs(x= "Sample", y = "Relative abundance (%)") + 
  geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity", width=0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = col_vector) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::percent_format()) + 
  facet_wrap(~Group, scales = "free_x")+ #Grouping by grape stage 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.minor.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "italic"))

Species_barplot

ggsave("Fig/Species_barplot2.tiff", height=5, width=10, device="tiff")
```


# 4) Summary tables:

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)

###### fix: as.character() on pull() inside make_table
make_table <- function(data, taxon_col, count_col, n_top = 10) {
  top_taxa <- data %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(taxon_col))) %>%
    summarise(mean_count = mean(.data[[count_col]]), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_count)) %>%
    slice_head(n = n_top) %>%
    pull(1) %>%
    as.character()

  top_taxa <- top_taxa[top_taxa != "Others"]  ###### fix: drop pre-existing "Others"

  data %>%
    mutate(taxon = ifelse(as.character(.data[[taxon_col]]) %in% top_taxa,
                          as.character(.data[[taxon_col]]), "Others")) %>%
    group_by(taxon) %>%
    summarise(mean_count = mean(.data[[count_col]]), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(
      taxon = factor(taxon, levels = c(top_taxa, "Others")),
      pct = round(mean_count / sum(mean_count) * 100, 2)
    ) %>%
    arrange(taxon) %>%
    select(Taxon = taxon, `Relative Abundance (%)` = pct)
}

phylum_tbl <- make_table(Phylum_table_bp, "Phylum", "count") %>% rename(Phylum = Taxon)
class_tbl <- make_table(Class_table_bp,  "Class",  "count") %>% rename(Class  = Taxon)
order_tbl <- make_table(Order_table_bp,  "Order",  "count") %>% rename(Order  = Taxon)


```



```{r}
# Combine into one wide table (padded to same length)
max_rows <- max(nrow(phylum_tbl), nrow(class_tbl), nrow(order_tbl))

pad_table <- function(df, n) {
  if (nrow(df) < n) {
    extra <- data.frame(matrix(NA, n - nrow(df), ncol(df)))
    colnames(extra) <- colnames(df)
    df <- bind_rows(df, extra)
  }
  df
}

combined_tbl <- bind_cols(
  pad_table(phylum_tbl, max_rows),
  pad_table(class_tbl, max_rows),
  pad_table(order_tbl, max_rows)
)

# Display with gt 
combined_tbl %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Relative Abundance of Gut Fungal Communities**"),
    subtitle = md("Top 10 taxa per taxonomic level (mean across all samples)")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Phylum", columns = 1:2, id = "sp_phylum") %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Class", columns = 3:4, id = "sp_class")  %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Order", columns = 5:6, id = "sp_order")  %>%
  cols_label(
    1 ~ "Taxon", 2 ~ "RA (%)",
    3 ~ "Taxon", 4 ~ "RA (%)",
    5 ~ "Taxon", 6 ~ "RA (%)"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(style = "italic", color = "grey50"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = which(combined_tbl[[1]] == "Others" |
                                        combined_tbl[[3]] == "Others" |
                                        combined_tbl[[5]] == "Others"))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#f5f5f5"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, max_rows, 2))
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = where(is.numeric), decimals = 2) %>%
  sub_missing(missing_text = "") %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = 12,
    heading.align = "center",
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.border.top.color = "black",
    table.border.bottom.color = "black",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "black"
  )

# Save 
write.csv(phylum_tbl, "Fig/Table_Phylum_abundance.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(class_tbl,"Fig/Table_Class_abundance.csv",  row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(order_tbl, "Fig/Table_Order_abundance.csv",  row.names = FALSE)


```
